user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new shift with start and end times, so that employee working hours are defined
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Shift screen; When I click "Add new shift" and enter Name, Start time, End time and Weekly off(s); Then the shift is saved with its calculated duration and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view all shifts with their timing and location details, so that I can review scheduling across the organization
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Shift screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns for Shift id, Name, Start time, End time, Duration (hrs), Default shift, Location(s) and Weekly off(s)

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to designate a default shift, so that employees without a specific shift are assigned a standard schedule
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a shift; When I mark it as the default shift; Then it is flagged Yes in the Default shift column

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to assign locations and weekly offs to a shift, so that shift timings and rest days match each site
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a shift; When I select the applicable Location(s) and Weekly off(s); Then they are saved and displayed for the shift

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to control which roles the shift roster is visible to, so that only authorized users can view shift schedules
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Shift screen; When I set "Shift roster visible to" using the selector; Then visibility of the roster is restricted accordingly

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit and save changes to existing shifts, so that shift definitions remain accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given a shift is listed; When I click Edit, change its details and click Save; Then the updated shift is persisted and shown in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the shift list, so that I can browse all 31 shifts with current data
acceptance_criteria: Given the shift list spans multiple pages; When I use the pagination controls or click Refresh; Then the corresponding shifts are displayed with updated data
